provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Botswana Savings Bank (Transition) Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: the Board of the Botswana Savings Bank established under the Botswana Savings Bank Act (Cap. 56:03)
the Botswana Savings Bank established under the Botswana Savings Bank Act
Botswana Savings Bank Limited, as continued under section 3
